function.outcome_justification: The service line `staff follow-up support` appears in INV-0007 (2026-01-12, 110), INV-0008 (2026-02-10, 220), and INV-0011 (2026-04-20, 160). Filtering to since 2026-04-01 leaves only INV-0011, so total is 160.
